mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically boosting S&P 500 valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 5.5 percent within a single month, labor market deterioration triggers risk-off repricing, depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the threshold crossing fails to predict downward price momentum in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in industrial production and a decline in real personal consumption expenditures signal aggregate demand weakness outpacing supply adjustments, compressing corporate earnings expectations and driving negative equity returns over a quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 115 and GDPC1 growth decelerates below 2% annualized
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative quarterly returns more than 55% of the time, or single-series ICs dominate the interaction term in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid policy tightening, rising short-term rates amplify the negative impact of cooling housing starts on financial conditions, accelerating equity drawdowns over the following month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when both FEDFUNDS and HOUST signal stress, or the regime filter fails to improve predictive power over a baseline model.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects robust corporate hiring and wage expansion, supporting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns in positive payroll growth months are statistically indistinguishable from flat months.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 3.0 percent year-over-year, persistent inflation erodes real purchasing power and forces monetary policy accommodation, triggering a negative repricing of equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when inflation crosses the threshold, or the signal generates false positives in disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between surging industrial production and collapsing housing starts indicates a structural shift toward commercial investment at the expense of residential demand, signaling sectoral rotation that depresses broad equity indices over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The interaction term lacks statistical significance in a multivariate return model, or forward returns do not decline when the divergence widens.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion where unemployment remains below 5.0 percent, any sudden spike in the federal funds rate triggers a liquidity crunch that rapidly compresses equity multiples over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: Equity markets absorb rate hikes without significant drawdowns when labor data remains tight, or the combined signal fails to outperform a single-factor rate model.
